creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
FreeBSD 13.0-RELEASE-p6

The panic happened during a "chflags -R nosimmutable /home/username/dir" operation.

I have 150+ servers with exactly the same setup and almost the same hardware and it's the first time I see such panic.

I don't know if it was hardware related (this server runs fine after after a fsck for few days).

Also I have no way to reproduce the crash.

Core dump is available.

-----------
